gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Updating the front page with the latest gossip from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README latest news section to reflect recent changes.
gist.impact: Ensures the GitHub landing page stays synchronized with the latest project activity.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a paperboy/news-bee, delivering a pixelated newspaper to the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot delivering a rolled-up newspaper to the robot companion. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
